query: SciLLM opencode transport runs 401 Unauthorized X-Caller-Skill Authorization Bearer

results.title: fix: Plugin client returns 401 Unauthorized when OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD is set (Desktop) · Issue #8676 · anomalyco/opencode
results.description: Use CLI version (opencode command) instead of Desktop, as CLI does not set OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD.

results.title: How to resolve "401 Unauthorized" errors in OpenClaw model calls? - Tencent Cloud
results.description: import requests url = "https://api.example.com/openclaw/endpoint" headers = { "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" } response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json={"input": "Your input data"}) print(response.status_code) print(response.json())

results.title: 401 Unauthorized Error: Causes & mTLS Fix Guide (2026)
results.description: The request reached the API but lacked valid authentication. Check that the Authorization header is present, formatted correctly, and contains a non-expired credential - whether that is a Bearer token, an API key, or a client certificate depending ...

results.title: HTTP 401 Unauthorized: Causes & Fixes | Authgear
results.description: Common mistakes: Bearer: eyJ... (wrong format — the header name is Authorization, not Bearer), a trailing space after “Bearer”, or omitting the space entirely.
